title: tonningia ceylanica
intro: Tonningia ceylanica, also known as the 'Ceylon Tonningia', is a type of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to Sri Lanka. The medicinal properties of Tonningia ceylanica are attributed to its leaves and roots, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include treating fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as having antiseptic and antifungal properties. Tonningia ceylanica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
